description: Completion payload emitted on bind:finished SSE channel. Contains the fully materialized annotation with its new body, so the client can update its local state without an additional fetch.

correlationId.description: Echoes the correlationId from the originating bind:update-body command, if any.

annotation.description: The annotation as it exists in the materialized view immediately after the bind operation persisted. Includes the new body operations applied. This is the authoritative post-bind state — clients should write it directly into their local cache without refetching.
